title: Uploading a PDF form with information to populate the board automatically.
excerpt:

posts.author: dolfodazeeeeee (adolfo)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use a pdf with the same information for every job, task. Our PDF will usually contain a 1. Job Number 2. due date 3. image needed 4. second image needed.

Is there a way we can custom have monday read that form once it’s uploaded and automatically create the new task itself?

We typically have someone upload all the information for each one which is a bit daunting. I feel like Monday could easily read a pdf if the same information is applied in the same area over and over I that makes sense.
